mapper.select: SELECT Volun_Act_No AS volunActNo, Volun_Act_Title AS volunActTitle, Volun_Act_Address AS volunActAddress, Volun_Act_Proc_Begin AS volunActProcBegin, Volun_Act_Proc_End AS volunActProcEnd, Volun_Act_Point AS volunActPoint, Volun_Act_Act_Type AS volunActType FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY ORDER BY Volun_Act_No DESC
